text: Chris Brown's Security Head Says He Paid Ex-Housekeeper 5-Figure Sum After Dog Attack - TMZ

text: The golden age of handheld gaming is already over - The Verge

text: Ex-CIA official charged with stealing millions of dollars in gold bars - NPR

text: Google engineer made $1.2M by placing bets on Polymarket using confidential info, prosecutors allege - NBC News
